title: Laboratory
content: Laboratory The Department of Civil Engineering houses various laboratories. A summary of the same is given below. The detailed description of each laboratory is given in files linked the individual laboratory names. S. No. Laboratory Name Faculty-in-Charge Laboratory Technician 1 Fluvial Hydraulics and Research Dr. Ashish Kumar Jaswinder Singh 2 Structural Mechanics Dr. Tanmay Gupta Jaswinder Singh 3 Surveying Mr. Akash Bhardwaj Jaswinder Singh 4 Geotechnical Mr. Niraj Parihar Amar Kumar 5 Workshop Practices Mr. Kaushal Kumar Pradeep Kumar 6 Civil Software Mr. Chandrapal Gautam Rajesh Sahu 7 Engineering Graphics Mr. Chandrapal Gautam Rajesh Sahu 8 Chemistry & Environment Engineering Dr. Rishi Rana Amar Kumar 9 Concrete Dr. Saurav Jaswinder Singh 10 Highway Engineering Dr. Amardeep Jaswinder Singh 11 Fluid Mechanics Mr. Kaushal Kumar Jaswinder Singh
